STS2_MULUNDUS-GRIM.description: When exhausted, this card is played.
STS2_MULUNDUS-GRIM.title: Grim
STS2_MULUNDUS-ENTERSTANCE.description: Remove all cards with [gold]Stance[/gold] from your hand.
STS2_MULUNDUS-ENTERSTANCE.title: Enter Stance
STS2_MULUNDUS-STANCE.description: When you enter another stance, remove this card from your hand.
STS2_MULUNDUS-STANCE.title: Stance
STS2_MULUNDUS-EBB.description: This card costs less if the last card you played was an attack.
STS2_MULUNDUS-EBB.title: Ebb
STS2_MULUNDUS-FLOW.description: The card costs less if the last card you played was a skill.
STS2_MULUNDUS-FLOW.title: Flow
STS2_MULUNDUS-BALANCED.description: If you have an equal number of attacks and skills in your hand, you are balanced.
STS2_MULUNDUS-BALANCED.title: Balanced
